name: oira-viewer
description: Static viewer for OIRA regulatory reviews, powered by nightly snapshots of reginfo.gov XML feeds.

scripts.backfill:oira: for y in $(seq 2017 $(date +%Y)); do node scripts/fetch-year.mjs $y || echo skip $y; done
scripts.backfill:fr: for y in $(seq 2017 $(date +%Y)); do node scripts/fetch-fr-year.mjs $y || echo skip $y; done && node scripts/build-fr-index.mjs
